changeSet.author: nexus-2zv75
changeSet.comment: Add updated_at TIMESTAMPTZ to document_aspects and topics (DEFAULT now())
changeSet.sql: ALTER TABLE nexus.document_aspects ADD COLUMN updated_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL DEFAULT now(); ALTER TABLE nexus.topics ADD COLUMN updated_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL DEFAULT now();
changeSet.rollback: ALTER TABLE nexus.topics DROP COLUMN IF EXISTS updated_at; ALTER TABLE nexus.document_aspects DROP COLUMN IF EXISTS updated_at;

changeSet.author: nexus-2zv75
changeSet.comment: Shared BEFORE UPDATE stamp function (SECURITY INVOKER)

changeSet.author: nexus-2zv75
changeSet.comment: BEFORE UPDATE FOR EACH ROW triggers stamping updated_at
changeSet.sql:
CREATE TRIGGER trg_document_aspects_updated_at BEFORE UPDATE ON nexus.document_aspects FOR EACH ROW EXECUTE FUNCTION nexus.stamp_updated_at();
CREATE TRIGGER trg_topics_updated_at BEFORE UPDATE ON nexus.topics FOR EACH ROW EXECUTE FUNCTION nexus.stamp_updated_at();
changeSet.rollback: DROP TRIGGER IF EXISTS trg_topics_updated_at ON nexus.topics; DROP TRIGGER IF EXISTS trg_document_aspects_updated_at ON nexus.document_aspects;
